src: 📄 ATS Resume Scanner Pro  An AI-powered ATS (Applicant Tracking System) Resume Scanner built using Streamlit and Groq AI. This tool analyzes a resume against a job description and provides an ATS compatibility score, keyword analysis, skill gaps, and actionable improvement suggestions.
ja: AI搭載のATS（応募者追跡システム）履歴書スキャナー。StreamlitとGroq AIで構築。履歴書を求人票と照合し、ATS適合スコア、キーワード分析、スキルギャップ、改善提案を提供。
